name: serverless-order-pipeline
description: Event-driven order ingestion pipeline on AWS serverless

scripts.dev:up: docker-compose up -d && ./scripts/localstack-up.sh && pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter frontend dev &
scripts.test:integration: docker-compose up -d && ./scripts/seed-localstack.sh && sleep 5 && pnpm --filter backend test:integration
